exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Holding at 80kg — no log to progress from. Feet shoulder-width mid-plate, full depth (thighs past 90°). Do not lock knees.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Holding at 20kg per hand. Hinge at hips, soft knee bend. Hold the hamstring stretch before driving hips forward.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Holding at 35kg. Full extension, hold 1 sec at top. Controlled — no swinging.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Holding at 35kg. Curl fully, 3-second eccentric on the way down.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Holding at 60kg. Deep stretch at bottom, full contraction at top. Slow eccentric.
